시편 21:1.content: The king rejoices in your strength, Yahweh! How greatly he rejoices in your salvation!

시편 21:2.content: You have given him his heart’s desire, and have not withheld the request of his lips.

시편 21:3.content: For you meet him with the blessings of goodness. You set a crown of fine gold on his head.

시편 21:4.content: He asked life of you and you gave it to him, even length of days forever and ever.

시편 21:5.content: His glory is great in your salvation. You lay honor and majesty on him.

시편 21:6.content: For you make him most blessed forever. You make him glad with joy in your presence.

시편 21:7.content: For the king trusts in Yahweh. Through the loving kindness of the Most High, he shall not be moved.

시편 21:8.content: Your hand will find out all of your enemies. Your right hand will find out those who hate you.

시편 21:9.content: You will make them as a fiery furnace in the time of your anger. Yahweh will swallow them up in his wrath. The fire shall devour them.

시편 21:10.content: You will destroy their descendants from the earth, their posterity from among the children of men.

시편 21:11.content: For they intended evil against you. They plotted evil against you which cannot succeed.

시편 21:12.content: For you will make them turn their back, when you aim drawn bows at their face.

시편 21:13.content: Be exalted, Yahweh, in your strength, so we will sing and praise your power.
